name: anyside
description: A Manifest V3 Chrome extension that keeps AI services in the Chrome Side Panel.

scripts.build: npm run clean && tsc -p tsconfig.json && node scripts/build.mjs --bundle-content
scripts.test: npm run typecheck && npm run build && node --test test/*.test.mjs
scripts.release:zip: npm run typecheck && npm run build && node scripts/package-extension.mjs
